question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/service/TransactionExecutionService.java -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: execute()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a `CallServiceParameters` with a maximally-sized `callData` byte array (e.g., tens of megabytes) to `buildContractCallTransactionBody()` via `Bytes.wrap(params.getCallData())`, causing heap exhaustion in the JVM and crashing the mirror node service, resulting in a non-network DoS?
